CustomField.description: Number of days past the expected donation date after which NPPatch automatically changes a Recurring Donation's status to the Lapsed value if no payment has been received. Leave blank or set to 0 to disable automatic lapsing. Typically set lower than the Days for Closed value. Requires Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days past the expected donation date before a Recurring Donation is marked as lapsed. Leave blank to disable. Should be lower than Days for Closed.
CustomField.label: Status Automation Days for Lapsed
